drl:
rule "R0"
salience 4
when
    T0()
    T0(f0 <= -0.5, $b0_1_0 : f0)
then
    insert(new T1("alpha", "a", false));
    insert(new T1("", "b", false));
end
rule "R1"
salience 1
when
    T0(f0 <= 2, $b1_0_0 : f1, $b1_0_1 : f0)
    $p1_1 : T1(f0 <= "alpha", f2 != true, $b1_1_0 : f0, $b1_1_1 : f0, f2 == false)
    T1(f1 != "beta", f1 >= $b1_1_1)
then
    $p1_1.setF2(true);
    $p1_1.setF1("");
    update($p1_1);
end
rule "R2"
salience 3
when
    $p2_0 : T0(f0 < -0.5, f1 != true, $b2_0_0 : f0, f1 == false)
    T1(f1 <= "", f2 != true, $b2_1_0 : f2)
then
    $p2_0.setF1(true);
    $p2_0.setF0($p2_0.getF0());
    update($p2_0);
end
rule "R3"
when
    $p3_0 : T0(f1 == false)
then
    insert(new T1("alpha", "", $p3_0.isF1()));
end
rule "R4"
salience -6
when
    $p4_0 : T1(f0 != "ab", f2 == false)
then
    modify($p4_0) { setF2(true) }
end
